title: LEGO City Police Boat Chase Set - incl. 2 Boat Toys, 3 Minifigures & a Shark Animal Figure - Gift for 6+ Year Old Boys & Girls - 60456
features: Police boat chase for everyday heroes – Kids dive into an ocean of adventure with the LEGO City Police Boat Chase set, packed with police action and construction toys for 6+ year old boys and girls
What’s in the box? – Includes everything needed to build a toy boat, crook’s power dinghy, two police officer LEGO minifigures, a crook minifigure and a shark animal figure for ocean fun
Features and functions – Kids can seat two officer minifigures in the police toy boat’s cockpit, lock the crook in the cell and float the crook’s dinghy and the toy boat for thrilling water play
Minifigure accessories – This LEGO building set includes fun police toys and accessories like a toy ruby, handcuffs, torch, chain and life buoy to spark imaginative adventures
A LEGO gift for any occasion – A brilliant anytime surprise or a birthday gift for 6+ year old boys and girls, for fans of police playsets, shark toys and animal figures
More sets to collect – Kids can add this toy boat set to other LEGO City construction toys (sold separately) to expand their adventures with more vehicles, structures and imaginative play
A city without limits – LEGO City building toys inspire kids to create, explore and play with structures, vehicles, citizens, animal toys and exciting adventures for endless creative fun
description: From the manufacturer High-speed police boat chase playset! Treat your everyday hero to this LEGO City playset for ages 6 and over, featuring a build-and-float police boat and power dinghy. Creative build-and-play toy Kids enjoy an immersive building experience before diving into an ocean of crook-catching adventures. LEGO City Police Boat Chase Ready for action Cool police boat with twin outboard motors and an onboard holding cell. Toy boats that float Kids can float the model police boat and crook’s power dinghy on water. Minifigures for imaginative play All-action fun with 2 police officers, a crook and a shark figure. Enter a digital world of building Builders can zoom in, rotate sets in 3D and track their progress using the fun, intuitive LEGO Builder app. The adventure has just begun! Combine this building set with others from the LEGO City range (sets sold separately) for more fun-packed adventures.
